MINI MINUTES: David Hunter, Esq. appearing for Defendant; no appearance by Plaintiff. The jurisdiction of the arbitrator is extended through Sep-20-2016. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Sep-20-2016, at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Motion Relieve As Counsel (Per Insistence)
Off Calendar May-12-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Attorney Steve Lau's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for Plaintiff Cassie Cook is taken off calendar as moot. A substitution of counsel was filed on March 26, 2015. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302.
